_about: mem4 recall QA fixture. Each item: index `knowledge`, run `query` against recall, count correct if any hit's snippet contains `expect_substr`. `paraphrase=true` means the query deliberately avoids the knowledge's wording (tests rephrase-miss — Fable 5 §3/§6). Mix of English + Chinese, exact-identifier + paraphrase, long + short CJK tokens.

items.query: which VPS provider hosts toothless
items.knowledge: toothless is deployed on a LightNode VPS in Tokyo

items.query: Baserow table for memory audit
items.knowledge: The memory_audit data lives in Baserow table 907

items.query: which script warms the L1 cache
items.knowledge: mem.sh resolves a route code to the L1 cache microfile

items.query: full text search engine used by mem4
items.knowledge: mem4 recall uses SQLite FTS5 with a trigram tokenizer for CJK

items.query: how does toothless reach the NAS
items.knowledge: toothless reaches the NAS over Tailscale at 100.98.31.81

items.query: where is the agent server running
items.knowledge: toothless is deployed on a LightNode VPS in Tokyo

items.query: how do we keep records of recall quality
items.knowledge: The memory_audit data lives in Baserow table 907

items.query: what indexing technology powers lookups
items.knowledge: mem4 recall uses SQLite FTS5 with a trigram tokenizer for CJK

items.query: private network path to the storage box
items.knowledge: toothless reaches the NAS over Tailscale at 100.98.31.81

items.query: the fork we push our branches to
items.knowledge: All mem4 work lives on the fork origin sam7894604 hermes-agent

items.query: default backend for mem4 storage
items.knowledge: mem4 defaults to the local-file backend under HERMES_HOME/mem4

items.query: what triggers Dream consolidation
items.knowledge: Dream triggers on a threshold of new writes or a staleness floor at session boundaries

items.query: toothless 部署在哪個供應商
items.knowledge: toothless 部署在 LightNode 的 VPS,位於東京機房

items.query: 記憶審計資料表
items.knowledge: 記憶審計資料存在 Baserow 資料表 907

items.query: 召回用的全文檢索引擎
items.knowledge: mem4 召回使用 SQLite FTS5,中文走 trigram 分詞

items.query: 四層記憶的架構決策編號
items.knowledge: 四層路由記憶的架構決策記錄在 ADR-018

items.query: toothless 經什麼直連 NAS
items.knowledge: toothless 經 Tailscale 直連 NAS,位址 100.98.31.81

items.query: 部署
items.knowledge: 本次的部署目標機器是 toothless

items.query: 召回
items.knowledge: 召回層由 FTS5 提供

items.knowledge: toothless 部署在 LightNode 的 VPS,位於東京機房

items.knowledge: 記憶審計資料存在 Baserow 資料表 907

items.query: 分層記憶為什麼要重構

items.query: mem4 預設儲存後端
items.knowledge: mem4 預設用 local-file 後端,放在 HERMES_HOME 下的 mem4 目錄

items.query: Dream 觸發條件
items.knowledge: Dream 由新寫入數超過門檻,或 session 邊界的 staleness 下限觸發
